name: tradingagents
description: Substanz Edition — 4 analysts + 13 famous-investor personas (Buffett/Burry/Wood/...) + bull/bear debate + trader + risk manager + DCF/Kelly/ATR/Sharpe quant tools + backtester + read-only Next.js dashboard. Multi-mode (quick/standard/deep), multi-style (value/growth/macro/contrarian/council).

api_token.title: Alpha Vantage API key
api_token.description: Free key from https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key (free tier = 25 requests/day; results cached locally for 1h).

fds_api_token.title: Financial Datasets API key (optional)
fds_api_token.description: Optional — premium fundamentals data via https://financialdatasets.ai. Leave empty to use only the free Alpha Vantage + yfinance sources.
